headline: 14. OURA
summary: OURA, at the center of the tracking of the health and wellness boom, ranks No. 14 on CNBC’s 2026 Disruptor 50 list.

headline: 44. WHOOP
summary: WHOOP, which has tried to redefine the wearables category from performance tracking to preventative health, ranks No. 44 on CNBC’s 2026 Disruptor 50 list.
